_status: draft on packs 1-2; refine when 3-5 land
description_skeleton: their style is ULTRA-minimal (300-390 chars): subscribe + support links + affiliate gear, ZERO synopsis
ours (better): 2-3 line hook quoting the video's most specific narration, then chapters, then Sources block (studio rule), then support links; still SHORT, no essay

tags.lead: brand tags first (channel name, format tags like 'stick figure history'), then per-segment entities (every named person/place/event)

chapter_naming: story names, not descriptions (Ben, Yun Shin, The Battle of Busan)

aaaflow_mapping.packaging: keep description SHORT; entity tags auto-lead via packaging._entities; chapters from scene sections; Sources block stays (our improvement)
aaaflow_mapping.no_boilerplate: no 'subscribe so...' lines in the description body (studio rule)
